purpose: Run bounded private multi-seed and one-notch budget-ladder evidence for the matched SymLiquid-style vs transformer code-proposer comparator before making architecture claims.

seed_sweep.claim_language: report mean, standard deviation, min, max, and per-seed deltas; do not declare an architecture winner from one seed

budget_tiers.description: Repeat the current code-proposer smoke across five seeds with the same private data, verifier, STS controls, fanout, and matched parameter discipline.
One bounded scale step to test whether the gap widens, narrows, or flips with more capacity while preserving matching discipline.

score_semantics: Private architecture evidence only. Public calibration, teacher calls, distillation, network fetches, long unattended training, and model promotion remain locked.
